pi_items.source: Task specification: 'Block 100 mm (Length along X) x 30 mm (Width along Y) x 15 mm (Thickness along Z)'
Calculated from specifications: base block (45000 mm³) minus counterbored holes (1260.56 mm³) minus V-groove (239.44 mm³) = 43500.0 mm³
Verifier code (export_result.sh and verifier.py line 76) uses 'abs(vol - 43500) < 3000', not 2500.0
Task specification output path. Confirmed by setup_task.sh (creates directory) and export_result.sh (writes to this path)

privileged_info_summary: The robot gripper finger design task requires creating a FreeCAD model with base dimensions 100 x 30 x 15 mm³, producing an expected volume of 43500.0 mm³. The model includes two counterbored mounting holes at position X=15, Y=±8 mm, and a V-groove centered at X=85 mm. Critical discrepancy: the metadata specifies a volume tolerance of 2500.0 mm³, but the verifier code uses 3000.0 mm³ (±6.8% difference). The task is synthetic, with the agent creating the model from scratch in FreeCAD rather than analyzing pre-existing data.
